case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. SHERRY ANDREWS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1485 PINE STREET, #417, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY DOES 1 TO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA SERVED JAN-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, SHERRY
